feature: Frontend Hexagonal Architecture — Enforcing ADR-056 Layer Boundaries
description: Apply hexagonal architecture to the SolidJS dashboard frontend. Extracts I/O (fetch, WebSocket) from stores into services/, creates port interfaces in types/, removes inline styles and hardcoded colors from components, and adds hex analyze rules for frontend boundary checking. 5 phases, 15 tasks.

phases.name: Port Interfaces — Define Frontend Contracts
phases.description: Create TypeScript interfaces in types/ that define the contracts between stores (domain) and services (secondary adapters). These interfaces are the frontend equivalent of backend port traits.

tasks.name: Create port interfaces for REST and WebSocket services
tasks.description: Create types/services.ts with interfaces: (1) IRestClient — typed fetch wrapper with methods like get<T>(path), post<T>(path, body), delete(path), (2) IChatTransport — WebSocket contract: connect(), disconnect(), send(msg), onMessage(cb), onStatus(cb), (3) IGitTransport — WebSocket contract for git real-time updates, (4) IStorageAdapter — localStorage get/set/remove. These interfaces decouple stores from I/O implementations.

tasks.name: Create shared domain types for chat, session, and project
tasks.description: Move ChatMessage type from components/chat/Message.tsx into types/chat.ts. Create types/project.ts for Project shape (currently inlined in stores). Create types/session.ts for session types. Stores and components both import from types/ — this eliminates the current circular reference where stores import from components.

phases.name: Extract Services — I/O Out of Stores
phases.description: Create services/ directory with singleton implementations of the port interfaces. Extract all fetch() and WebSocket code from stores into these services. This is the core refactor — after this phase, stores contain only pure signals and derived computations.

tasks.name: Create REST client service (singleton)
tasks.description: Create services/rest-client.ts implementing IRestClient. Singleton module-level instance. Typed methods: get<T>(path), post<T>(path, body), patch<T>(path, body), delete(path). Handles auth token injection from localStorage. Handles error responses uniformly. All stores and components that currently call fetch() will migrate to this client.

tasks.name: Create chat WebSocket service and extract from chat store
tasks.description: Create services/chat-ws.ts implementing IChatTransport. Extract WebSocket lifecycle (connect, reconnect, message parsing) from stores/chat.ts. The service owns the WebSocket instance and reconnection logic. It exposes callbacks (onMessage, onStatus) that the chat store subscribes to. Refactor stores/chat.ts to import from services/chat-ws.ts instead of creating WebSocket directly. After this: stores/chat.ts has zero fetch() and zero WebSocket references (fixes F2 violation).

tasks.name: Create git WebSocket service and extract from git store
tasks.description: Create services/git-ws.ts for the git real-time WebSocket. Extract WebSocket creation from stores/git.ts. Create services/git-rest.ts or use the shared rest-client for git REST calls. Refactor stores/git.ts to use services instead of direct fetch()/WebSocket. After this: stores/git.ts has zero I/O.

tasks.name: Extract fetch from remaining stores (projects, health, workplan, session, commands)
tasks.description: Refactor stores that call fetch() to use the REST client service instead: (1) stores/projects.ts — 3 fetch calls (init, archive, delete), (2) stores/health.ts — 2 fetch calls (status, analyze), (3) stores/workplan.ts — 5 fetch calls (list, report, execute, pause, resume), (4) stores/nexus-health.ts — 1 fetch call (version), (5) stores/session.ts — uses fetch wrapper, (6) stores/commands.ts — 2 fetch calls (analyze, sync). Each store imports restClient from services/rest-client.ts. After this: ALL stores have zero fetch() calls (F2 fully satisfied).

tasks.name: Create localStorage adapter service
tasks.description: Create services/local-storage.ts implementing IStorageAdapter. Wraps localStorage with typed get/set/remove methods and JSON serialization. Migrate stores that use localStorage directly (chat.ts auth token, session persistence) to use this adapter. Single point for storage — makes testing trivial (swap with in-memory mock).

phases.name: Component Fetch Extraction — F3 Compliance
phases.description: Migrate fetch() calls in components to use the REST client service or delegate to stores. Components should only render state and dispatch actions — never perform I/O directly.

tasks.name: Extract fetch from high-traffic components (ADRBrowser, ControlPlane, AgentFleet)
tasks.description: These 3 components have the most fetch() calls: (1) ADRBrowser.tsx — 6 fetch calls for ADR CRUD → move to stores/adrs.ts or use restClient, (2) ControlPlane.tsx — fetch for worktrees → move to git store, (3) AgentFleet.tsx — fetch for agent deletion → move to agent action in store. Pattern: component calls store action → store delegates to service → service makes HTTP call → updates signal → component re-renders. After this: these 3 components have zero fetch() calls.

tasks.name: Extract fetch from remaining components (19 files)
tasks.description: Migrate fetch() from all remaining components to use restClient or store actions: ConfigPage, FileTreeView, FileTree, DependencyGraphPane, FleetView, InferencePanel, AgentLog, SessionListPanel, SpawnDialog, AgentCard, BlueprintView, ContextView, ModelSelector, AgentDefsView, SkillsView, SwarmInitDialog, DiffViewer, ProjectChatWidget. For config-related components (SkillsView, AgentDefsView, HooksView, BlueprintView, ContextView), create a services/config-api.ts that wraps the /api/files endpoints. After this: F3 fully satisfied — zero fetch() in components/.

phases.name: Styling Compliance — F5/F9 Enforcement
phases.description: Remove inline style={{}} from all 31 violating components and replace hardcoded hex color literals in 20 components with Tailwind classes from the design system.

gate.command: cd hex-nexus/assets && ! grep -r 'style={' src/components/ && ! grep -rP '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}' src/components/

tasks.name: Replace inline styles with Tailwind in all 31 components
tasks.description: Search all TSX files in components/ for style={{...}} and replace with equivalent Tailwind utility classes. Common patterns: (1) style={{ width: X }} → w-[X], (2) style={{ color: X }} → text-[color] or Tailwind color class, (3) style={{ maxHeight: X, overflow }} → max-h-[X] overflow-auto. 31 files need changes. Dynamic styles that depend on runtime values (e.g., progress bar width) use Tailwind arbitrary values: w-[${percent}%]. After this: F5 satisfied — zero style={{}} in components/.

tasks.name: Replace hardcoded hex colors with Tailwind design system classes
tasks.description: Search all TSX files in components/ for hardcoded hex colors (#RRGGBB, #RGB) and replace with Tailwind theme tokens. Map hex layer colors to tailwind.config.js: domain=#58a6ff→text-hex-domain, ports=#bc8cff→text-hex-ports, usecases=#3fb950→text-hex-usecases, primary=#f0883e→text-hex-primary, secondary=#d29922→text-hex-secondary. 20 files need changes. Extend tailwind.config.js with these hex-layer colors if not already present. After this: F9 satisfied — zero hardcoded colors in components/.

phases.name: Enforcement — hex analyze Frontend Rules
phases.description: Add frontend boundary checking rules to hex analyze so ADR-056 violations are caught before commit, just like backend hex rules.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-nexus --release && cargo test -p hex-nexus

tasks.name: Add frontend analysis rules to hex-nexus analysis module
tasks.description: Extend hex-nexus/src/analysis/ to check frontend code when --frontend flag is passed. Implement rules: (1) F1: count HTML files in assets/ (must be 1), (2) F2: grep stores/ for fetch()/WebSocket (must be 0), (3) F3: grep components/ for fetch()/WebSocket (must be 0), (4) F4: check components/ imports don't cross adapter dirs, (5) F5: grep components/ for style={ (must be 0), (6) F7: check services/ files export singletons, (7) F9: grep components/ for hex color literals (must be 0). Output format matches existing hex analyze output with ✓/✗ per rule.

tasks.name: Build and smoke test full stack
tasks.description: Build SolidJS assets (npx vite build). Rebuild hex-nexus with rust-embed (cargo build -p hex-nexus --release). Start daemon, verify: (1) Dashboard loads at /, (2) Chat WebSocket connects via service, (3) All stores update via service layer, (4) hex analyze . --frontend passes all F1-F9 rules, (5) No console errors for fetch/WebSocket.
